title: OpenStax Biology 2e
description: A source card for the OpenStax Biology 2e textbook and its openly licensed course materials.

pages.text: OpenStax Biology 2e is a peer-reviewed college-level biology textbook that can support advanced high school, AP, dual-enrollment, and introductory college work. It covers chemistry of life, cells, genetics, evolution, biodiversity, plants, animals, and ecology.

This source is best used as a chapter or section picker rather than a single long reading. Rights note: Biology 2e is licensed CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, and OpenStax brand assets are not covered by that content license.

usagePolicy.reason: This book may not be used in the training of large language models or otherwise be ingested into large language models or generative AI offerings without OpenStax's permission.

licenseAudit.note: OpenStax attribution, noncommercial, and share-alike requirements apply to adaptations. Generative-AI ingestion requires OpenStax permission.
